rationale: Visual-only changes to public/myco-quest-game.html for the 32-bit battle actor rendering: bumps the battle canvas vertical scale factor from 0.5 to 0.62 and minimum height from 140 to 180, scales the per-side actorScale to 1.34 for player / 1.28 for enemy (previously a flat 1.18 multiplier), and adjusts the stage anchor (actorCenterY = floorY - Math.round(44 * actorScale), actorScale = clamp(width/500, 1.3, 2.7), panelY 0.18 -> 0.15, panelH 0.34 -> 0.38, floorY 0.76 -> 0.79). Sprite drawing is enlarged: aura arc radius 34 -> 38, robe rects -18..20 / 24..-20..22, head circle radius 13 -> 14, eye rects widened, cap ellipse 21x10 -> 23x11, and new strokeRect/stroke calls add the 'stronger outlines' promised by the PR body. Enemy ellipse and aura scale up similarly (22 -> 25, 24 -> 29 for normal; 26 -> 30, 28 -> 34 for boss). Pure visual tweak matching the stated goal; clean.
